name: Blue Ridge Community and Technical College

audit_policy.cost_note: WV residents 65+ may enroll in WVCTCS courses at a reduced rate on a space-available basis per WV Code §18B-10-7a.

senior_discount.notes: WV residents aged 65+ may enroll in credit and non-credit courses at WV public colleges at reduced tuition and fees on a space-available basis per WV Code §18B-10-7a. Each governing board sets its own specifics.

restrictions: Specifics set by each governing board

steps: Provide proof of WV residency and age
application_process.timing: Register during the normal enrollment period
